message:
refactor(frankenterm-core): extract storage.rs test modules into sibling files (ft-dzats Phase 1a)

Splits the three top-level #[cfg(test)] modules out of the 30k-line
crates/frankenterm-core/src/storage.rs into sibling files under
crates/frankenterm-core/src/storage/. First phase of bead ft-dzats
("storage.rs Phase 1 — extract 11.4K lines of #[cfg(test)] modules").

Mechanical move with no test-behavior changes:

- crates/frankenterm-core/src/storage.rs:
  * The three inline `#[cfg(test)] mod queue_depth_tests { … }`,
    `mod backpressure_integration_tests { … }`, and
    `mod proptest_tests { … }` blocks are replaced with their three-line
    forward declarations (`#[cfg(test)] mod queue_depth_tests;` etc.).
  * Net effect: storage.rs shrinks by 774 lines.
  * #[cfg(test)] gating is preserved on each forward declaration so the
    test bodies remain stripped from non-test builds.

- crates/frankenterm-core/src/storage/queue_depth_tests.rs (new, 254
  lines): contents of the former inline mod queue_depth_tests
  verbatim. `use super::*;` continues to resolve to `crate::storage::*`
  because the new file is a sibling submodule of `storage`, so no path
  edits are required inside the moved test bodies. Covers
  StorageHandle::write_queue_depth / capacity, sustained-write depth
  growth, and the `wa_qd_test_*` temp-DB harness.

- crates/frankenterm-core/src/storage/backpressure_integration_tests.rs
  (new, 308 lines): ditto for the backpressure-tier integration tests
  (Green/Yellow/Red/Black transitions through the recorder mpsc path).

- crates/frankenterm-core/src/storage/proptest_tests.rs (new, 216
  lines): ditto for the proptest-driven storage round-trips, including
  the per-pane scoping property that ensures
  search_with_options(pane_id) does not bleed across panes.

No production code, schema, or behavior change — strictly a file move
to enable the Phase 1b/2 follow-on work the bead schedules (extracting
struct/enum surface and DDL strings out of storage.rs) without first
having to keep dragging 11.4K lines of inline tests through every
intermediate diff.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
